all_text_content:
Verse of the Day
And the people served the Lord all the days of Joshua, and all the days of the elders that outlived Joshua, who had seen all the great works of the Lord, that he did for Israel.
Judges 2:7
Quote of the Day
"Among the qualities that adorn true disciples of Christ, temperance stands out as a reflection of the Savior Himself."
Elder Ulisses Soares | 1 Oct 2025General Conference
